---
title: "STAT4540_HW3"
author: "John Dennis"
format: pdf
---

```{r,message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ISLR2)
library(astsa)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
```

### Problem 3

```{r,message=FALSE, results='hide'}
data <- read.csv("website-visitors.csv")

data_clean <- data %>%
  select(Date,
         Page.Loads) %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

ggplot(data_clean, aes(x=Date,y=Page.Loads)) +
  geom_line()
```

```{r,results='hide'}
acf1(data_clean$Page.Loads)
```

```{r}
model1 <- sarima(data_clean$Page.Loads, p = 2, d = 0, q = 1)
```

```{r}
model2 <- sarima(data_clean$Page.Loads, p = 1, d = 0, q = 2)
```
